mnemonics: CREATE CONNECT TRANSACT: CCT - Like a mobile network cell tower that Creates, Connects, and Transacts data for apps
keyPoints: SQLiteOpenHelper is the main class for creating and managing database creation and version management
The database is not actually created or opened until getWritableDatabase() or getReadableDatabase() is called
Transactions (beginTransaction(), setTransactionSuccessful(), endTransaction()) ensure data integrity by grouping operations as a single atomic unit
commonMistakes: Forgetting to call setTransactionSuccessful() before endTransaction(), which rolls back all operations
Not closing database connections and cursors, leading to memory leaks
Not handling database upgrade scenarios properly in onUpgrade() method when version number increases
